description:
Perform a DNS recursion policy audit on the capture file /home/ga/Documents/captures/dns.cap. Identify packets where the client requested recursion (Recursion Desired) and export them to /home/ga/Documents/captures/recursive_queries.pcap. Determine if the server supports recursion (Recursion Available) and create a JSON report at /home/ga/Documents/captures/dns_audit_report.json with the following structure:

{
  "total_packets": <total_count>,
  "recursive_queries_count": <rd_count>,
  "recursion_available_count": <ra_count>,
  "server_supports_recursion": <boolean>
}
